caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and black-rimmed glasses is positioned in the center of the frame against a solid dark gray background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved tunic featuring floral embroidery around the neckline and small floral patterns scattered across the fabric, complemented by a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to her clothing. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a small circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". Across the sequence, the woman remains in a static position, facing the camera and speaking. Her facial expressions and mouth movements change slightly as she talks, and her head shifts subtly, but she maintains her general posture and gaze throughout the clip.
